healing-herb.name: Healing Herb
healing-herb.description: A bitter green herb prized by hedge healers and alchemists.

iron-ore.name: Iron Ore
iron-ore.description: Rough iron-rich stone ready for smelting and shaping.

linen-cloth.name: Linen Cloth
linen-cloth.description: Clean woven cloth used for wraps, robes, and bindings.

moonpetal.name: Moonpetal
moonpetal.description: A pale marsh flower that stores cool magical essence.

shadow-ichor.name: Shadow Ichor
shadow-ichor.description: Dense dark fluid gathered from cursed things that haunt the fens.

warlord-crest-blade.name: Warlord Crestblade
warlord-crest-blade.description: A brutal legendary blade patterned after the banners and victories of forgotten warlords.

fenweave-raiment.name: Fenweave Raiment
fenweave-raiment.description: Ancient robes woven from moonpetals, marsh silk, and condensed swamp sorcery.

saintguard-bulwark.name: Saintguard Bulwark
saintguard-bulwark.description: A sanctified bulwark meant to turn aside curses, arrows, and monsters alike.

recipe-scroll-warlord-crest-blade.name: Recipe Scroll: Warlord Crestblade
recipe-scroll-warlord-crest-blade.description: A blood-stained forging scroll detailing the Warlord Crestblade.

recipe-scroll-saintguard-bulwark.name: Recipe Scroll: Saintguard Bulwark
recipe-scroll-saintguard-bulwark.description: A sanctified design scroll for the Saintguard Bulwark.

recipe-scroll-fenweave-raiment.name: Recipe Scroll: Fenweave Raiment
recipe-scroll-fenweave-raiment.description: A damp arcane pattern scroll describing the Fenweave Raiment.

recipe-scroll-dragon-heart.name: Recipe Scroll: Dragon's Heart
recipe-scroll-dragon-heart.description: An ancient masterwork scroll describing how to forge the Dragon's Heart.

stoneheart-tonic.name: Stoneheart Tonic
stoneheart-tonic.description: A granite-thick draught that hardens your body for the next exchange.

bloodthirst-philter.name: Bloodthirst Philter
bloodthirst-philter.description: A vicious crimson brew that turns aggression into stolen vitality.

verdant-vial.name: Verdant Vial
verdant-vial.description: Cool green liquid that causes flesh and resolve to knit back together.

focus-incense.name: Focus Incense
focus-incense.description: A sachet burned in battle to steady the mind and restore magical rhythm.

ember-oil.name: Ember Oil
ember-oil.description: A volatile weapon oil that makes each strike spit sparks and cinders.

ironbark-helm.name: Ironbark Helm
ironbark-helm.description: Layered bark, hide, and iron studs made for a front-liner.

vanguard-gauntlets.name: Vanguard Gauntlets
vanguard-gauntlets.description: Plated gloves that turn guarded hands into crushing blows.

trailbreaker-boots.name: Trailbreaker Boots
trailbreaker-boots.description: Heavy-soled boots for relentless marches and shield-wall advances.

lionheart-amulet.name: Lionheart Amulet
lionheart-amulet.description: A battlefield charm that steadies the pulse under pressure.

colossus-warhelm.name: Colossus Warhelm
colossus-warhelm.description: An enormous warhelm forged for champions who break lines head-on.

spellweave-hood.name: Spellweave Hood
spellweave-hood.description: A runic hood lined to contain loose sparks of magic.

glyphbound-gloves.name: Glyphbound Gloves
glyphbound-gloves.description: Arcane sigils stitched into the fingers sharpen spell release.

miststep-sandals.name: Miststep Sandals
miststep-sandals.description: Soft sandals that quiet footfalls in libraries and graveyards alike.

astral-pendant.name: Astral Pendant
astral-pendant.description: A silver-star pendant that hums when spells are near completion.

eclipse-cowl.name: Eclipse Cowl
eclipse-cowl.description: A moon-dark hood that swallows hostile intent into static whispers.

shadowhood.name: Shadowhood
shadowhood.description: A close-cut hood made to blur your profile in torchlight.

gripwrap-gloves.name: Gripwrap Gloves
gripwrap-gloves.description: Tight wraps that steady knives, bows, and lockpicks.

softstep-boots.name: Softstep Boots
softstep-boots.description: Whisper-soft boots prized by scouts and cutpurses.

venom-locket.name: Venom Locket
venom-locket.description: A hidden vial locket that keeps toxins close at hand.

duskveil-mask.name: Duskveil Mask
duskveil-mask.description: An elegant killing mask worn by assassins who never leave witnesses.

hawkfeather-cap.name: Hawkfeather Cap
hawkfeather-cap.description: A weathered cap trimmed with feathers from sharp-eyed hunters.

fletcher-grips.name: Fletcher Grips
fletcher-grips.description: Fingered gloves built to loose arrows without biting the skin.

briarstride-boots.name: Briarstride Boots
briarstride-boots.description: Mud-tested boots for pathfinders who live off the green trail.

moonleaf-amulet.name: Moonleaf Amulet
moonleaf-amulet.description: A leaf-shaped charm that helps a hunter read the wind and timing.

stormtracker-hood.name: Stormtracker Hood
stormtracker-hood.description: A hood woven for marksmen who stalk thunder and moving prey.

pilgrim-circlet.name: Pilgrim Circlet
pilgrim-circlet.description: A simple sanctified circlet for those who walk holy roads.

sanctified-handwraps.name: Sanctified Handwraps
sanctified-handwraps.description: Blessed wrappings that steady mace strokes and healing rites.

dawnwalker-sandals.name: Dawnwalker Sandals
dawnwalker-sandals.description: Holy road-sandals that remain warm even in crypt chill.

reliquary-amulet.name: Reliquary Amulet
reliquary-amulet.description: A tiny shrine worn at the throat to keep faith close.

halo-of-embers.name: Halo of Embers
halo-of-embers.description: An ember-lit halo that answers devotion with stubborn survival.

perk-crystal.name: Perk Crystal
perk-crystal.description: A crystallized set of equipment perks. Can be applied to rare+ gear at the Forge.

recipe-scroll-frostguard-aegis.name: Recipe: Frostguard Aegis
recipe-scroll-frostguard-aegis.description: A frost-encrusted scroll containing the forging technique for a legendary shield.

recipe-scroll-frozen-crown.name: Recipe: Frozen Crown
recipe-scroll-frozen-crown.description: A scroll detailing the creation of a helm of ancient frost.

recipe-scroll-drakebone-plate.name: Recipe: Drakebone Plate
recipe-scroll-drakebone-plate.description: Instructions for crafting armor from ice drake remains.

recipe-scroll-aldrics-frostbrand.name: Recipe: Aldric's Frostbrand
recipe-scroll-aldrics-frostbrand.description: The Frost King's own forging secrets, etched in runes of ice.

recipe-scroll-blizzard-treads.name: Recipe: Blizzard Treads
recipe-scroll-blizzard-treads.description: A scroll describing boots that walk on wind and ice.

recipe-scroll-caldera-plate.name: Recipe: Caldera Plate
recipe-scroll-caldera-plate.description: Forging secrets from the caldera depths.

recipe-scroll-ignavus-flamebrand.name: Recipe: Ignavus's Flamebrand
recipe-scroll-ignavus-flamebrand.description: The fire lord's own forging technique.

recipe-scroll-sovereign-plate.name: Recipe: Sovereign Plate
recipe-scroll-sovereign-plate.description: Forging secrets from the edge of reality.
